steps.formalization:
PREDICATES:
needs(x, y) ::: x needs y
rough(x) ::: x is rough
bald_eagle(x) ::: x is a bald eagle
bear(x) ::: x is a bear
dog(x) ::: x is a dog
chases(x, y) ::: x chases y
blue(x) ::: x is blue
nice(x) ::: x is nice
eats(x, y) ::: x eats y

PREMISES:
NOT rough(bald_eagle)
NOT needs(bear, bald_eagle)
needs(dog, bear)
forall x (rough(x) -> chases(x, bald_eagle))
forall x (needs(x, bear) -> NOT blue(x))
forall x (nice(bear) -> chases(bear, bald_eagle))
forall x (eats(x, bald_eagle) -> rough(x))
forall x forall y (cold(x) and chases(x, bear) -> rough(bear))
forall x forall y (eats(x, bear) and needs(x, bear) -> NOT eats(bear, bald_eagle))
forall x (cold(dog) and nice(dog) -> eats(dog, bald_eagle))
forall x (needs(x, bear) -> eats(x, bald_eagle))

CONCLUSION:
needs(dog, bear)

PREDICATES:

rough(x) ::: x is rough

blue(x) ::: x is blue
likes(x, y) ::: x likes y

PREMISES:

rough(bear)
visits(mouse, bear)
forall x (red(x) -> not rough(x))
forall x (rough(x) -> not blue(x))
forall x forall y (chases(x, mouse) -> chases(mouse, bear))
forall x forall y (chases(x, mouse) and big(mouse) -> visits(x, bear))
forall x forall y (likes(x, mouse) and not red(x) -> chases(mouse, bald_eagle))
forall x (chases(x, bear) -> kind(x))

CONCLUSION:
rough(bear)
